## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include any API or CLI interface changes if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
